## Overview

This skill implements the approach from the paper: VLingNav: Embodied Navigation with Adaptive Reasoning and Visual-Assisted Linguistic Memory

## Purpose

Implements advanced techniques for agent reasoning, search, and learning described in arXiv:2601.08665.

## When NOT to use

- Oversimplified reasoning tasks
